briefdescription.para: This function initializes the configuration for the DcDma Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
sets the base address of the DcDma instance

simplesect.para: Base address and DeviceId is same as the Dc Timing driver.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the write protection for DCDMA registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the write protection for DCDMA registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the DPDMA_GLBL register with trigger channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the Desc Delay for required channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
ID
specifies desc delay

briefdescription.para: This function programs the data QoS for a channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
is channel number.
to configure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the DPDMA_GLBL register with trigger channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
is channel number.
to configure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the Ax Cache register for specific channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
is channel number.
to configure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the AxProt register for specific channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
is channel number.
to configure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the channel state as enable, disable or idle.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
is channel to configure
sets the channel state.

briefdescription.para: This function checks for any pending transactions for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
Id is channel number

briefdescription.para: This function programs the DPDMA_GLBL register with trigger channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
Id is channel number.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
is interrupt to unmask.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the callback for different interrupt handlers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the DPDMA_GLBL register with trigger channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the DPDMA_GLBL register with retrigger channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function calls the VsyncInterrupt Handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function services the VsyncInterrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the descriptor address for each video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
type

briefdescription.para: This function sets the descriptor address for each video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
type

briefdescription.para: This function creates the descriptor for the DcDma Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function increments the LastDescId of DcDma Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets DcDma Audio Channel Control.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcDma instance.
